title: Vietnamese Salmon Soup
description: A delicious and flavorful soup inspired by Vietnamese cuisine, featuring salmon as the main protein.

ingredients.name: Sweet potatoes
ingredients.notes: Thicken the soup with creamy potatoes

ingredients.name: Sliced fresh cilantro
ingredients.notes: Add a pop of color and flavor

instructions: Heat the vegetable broth in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the sliced carrots and cook for 5 minutes, or until slightly tender.
Add the sweet potatoes and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Add the salmon fillets and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until cooked through.
Stir in the Vietnamese fish sauce and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Ladle the soup into bowls and garnish with sliced green onions and fresh cilantro.
Optional: Add a dollop of creamy sauce, such as sour cream or coconut cream, for added richness.
Garnish with additional fresh herbs, if desired.
